nasb.text: I will also break the gate bar of Damascus, And cut off the inhabitant from the valley of Aven, And him who holds the scepter, from Beth-eden; So the people of Aram will go exiled to Kir,” Says the Lord.

esv.text: I will break the gate-bar of Damascus, and cut off the inhabitants from the Valley of Aven, and him who holds the scepter from Beth-eden; and the people of Syria shall go into exile to Kir,” says the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必折斷大馬士革的門閂， 剪除亞文平原的居民， 以及伯．伊甸掌權的首領； 亞蘭的人民也必被擄至吉珥。’ 這是耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 我要折断大马士革城的门闩， 铲除亚文平原的居民和伯·伊甸的掌权者， 使亚兰人被掳到吉珥。 这是耶和华说的。”
